channel.title: AI AppSec Index Updates
channel.description: Updates to the AI AppSec Index - AI remediation benchmarks, ASPM matrices, CVE tracking, CRA compliance, false positive datasets.

item.title: v1.0.0 - AI AppSec Index Initial Release
item.description: Initial release with 6 datasets: AI Remediation Leaderboard, ASPM Capability Matrix, AI-Code Vulnerability Tracker (48+ CVEs), EU CRA Compliance Map with timeline tracker, False Positive Benchmarks. Includes interactive dashboard, Python package, Kaggle and HuggingFace distribution.

item.title: CRA Timeline Tracker Added
item.description: New CRA compliance timeline tracker with key dates (Sept 11 2026 reporting deadline, Dec 11 2027 full compliance), 7 requirement mappings to AppSec tools, and penalty information.

item.title: 48 Real CVEs Added to AI-Code Vulnerability Tracker
item.description: Expanded vulnerability dataset to 48 real CVEs across 8 CWE categories, covering AI code generation tools including Copilot, ChatGPT, CodeWhisperer, and Tabnine.
